data.name: Moomin
data.story: Moomin was rehomed from a local pet owner.
data.mission: He is an ambassador for the exploitation of wildlife in the fur trade.
data.fact: Because of their very dense and soft fur, chinchillas have often been used in the fur trade. It can take upwards of 100 chinchilla pelts to make a single fur coat. Chinchillas are currently endangered because they have been poached for their pelts, as well as due to habitat loss.
